backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature report describing required frontend pages, components, and theming with associated files and metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries for key frontend files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining OKLCH color variables and dark‑mode overrides for UI theming.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders SnippetViewerPage.
frontend/src/components/CodeSnippetBlock: Reusable code block component with syntax highlighting layout and copy‑to‑clipboard behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages a backend actor instance and refreshes it when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Comprehensive Internet Identity auth provider and hook managing login, stored identities, and status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder export for query hooks due to static data.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind theme using warm amber/orange OKLCH colors and code‑block styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application bootstrap wiring React, QueryClient, and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/SnippetViewerPage.tsx: Page rendering description text and two code snippets for AndroidManifest and Kotlin NotificationListenerService.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with dark mode, custom colors, fonts, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Defines project metadata, existing features, and a pending feature request for an Android auto-reply NotificationListenerService app.
